UADataType.Description: The kind of WoT document a resource carries: a Thing Description (a concrete instance) or a Thing Model (a reusable type template).

Field.Name: ThingDescription
Field.Description: A W3C WoT Thing Description (WoT-TD/1.1); projects to OPC UA instances.

Field.Name: ThingModel
Field.Description: A W3C WoT Thing Model (WoT-TM/1.1); projects to OPC UA types.

UADataType.Description: The lifecycle state of a WoT document's derived projection in the AddressSpace. The registry file always remains stored; this enum reflects only the state of the code-behind projection.

Field.Name: Unloaded
Field.Description: Stored but not projected into the AddressSpace.

Field.Name: Validating
Field.Description: Format and compatibility validation is in progress.

Field.Name: Loading
Field.Description: The projection is being materialized under a shadow generation.

Field.Name: Active
Field.Description: The projection is committed and serving as the active generation.

Field.Name: Failed
Field.Description: Validation or projection failed; the last valid projection (if any) stays active.

Field.Name: Superseded
Field.Description: A newer generation has replaced this one; retained until monitored items drain.

Field.Name: Retiring
Field.Description: Being retired; awaiting monitored-item drain before node removal.

Field.Name: Retired
Field.Description: The projection has been removed from the AddressSpace.

UADataType.Description: How a registry or document triggers refresh of its derived projection.

Field.Name: Manual
Field.Description: Only an explicit Refresh Method call re-projects.

Field.Name: Periodic
Field.Description: The registry re-projects on a fixed interval (RefreshInterval).

Field.Name: EventDriven
Field.Description: The registry re-projects when a stored document changes (write/CloseAndUpdate).

Field.Name: Scheduled
Field.Description: The registry re-projects on an implementation-defined schedule.

UADataType.Description: The commit granularity applied when a refresh projects one or more documents.

Field.Name: PerResource
Field.Description: Each resource commits independently; a failure isolates to that resource.

Field.Name: PerGroup
Field.Description: All resources of a group commit together or not at all.

Field.Name: PerClosure
Field.Description: A document and its full dependency closure (DAG) commit atomically.

Field.Name: PerRegistry
Field.Description: All selected documents commit as a single all-or-nothing transaction.

UADataType.Description: How the registry treats dependents when a document version is unloaded or deleted.

Field.Name: Reject
Field.Description: Reject the operation while any other loaded document still depends on it.

Field.Name: Retire
Field.Description: Retire the projection but keep the stored document for dependents to resolve.

Field.Name: Cascade
Field.Description: Unload dependents that resolve only through this document.

Field.Name: Force
Field.Description: Force-unload the projection even while dependents remain, marking them Failed.

UADataType.Description: The outcome of a validation, projection or refresh operation on a document or the registry.

Field.Name: Success
Field.Description: The operation completed and changed the projection.

Field.Name: Unchanged
Field.Description: The operation was idempotent; the content digest matched and nothing changed.

Field.Name: Warning
Field.Description: The operation completed with non-fatal warnings.

Field.Name: Skipped
Field.Description: The operation was not applicable and was skipped.

Field.Name: Rejected
Field.Description: The operation was rejected by policy (for example concurrency or delete policy).

Field.Name: Failed
Field.Description: The operation failed; the previous valid projection (if any) remains active.

UADataType.Description: The processing phase a document reached, used to locate where an outcome was produced.

Field.Name: Fetch
Field.Description: Fetching the document bytes and its @context/schema references.

Field.Name: Parse
Field.Description: Parsing the JSON-LD document.

Field.Name: FormatValidation
Field.Description: Validating the document against its WoT-TD/WoT-TM format.

Field.Name: CompatibilityValidation
Field.Description: Validating the version against the resource compatibility policy.

Field.Name: DependencyResolution
Field.Description: Resolving the dependency closure (tm:extends, tm:ref, links rel=type).

Field.Name: Projection
Field.Description: Materializing types/instances into a shadow generation.

Field.Name: Activation
Field.Description: Committing the shadow generation as active.

Field.Name: Retirement
Field.Description: Retiring a superseded generation after monitored items drain.

UADataType.Description: A single interaction operation a protocol binding supports, aligned with the WoT form op vocabulary.

Field.Name: ReadProperty
Field.Description: Read a property affordance.

Field.Name: WriteProperty
Field.Description: Write a property affordance.

Field.Name: ObserveProperty
Field.Description: Observe (subscribe to) a property affordance.

Field.Name: InvokeAction
Field.Description: Invoke an action affordance.

Field.Name: SubscribeEvent
Field.Description: Subscribe to an event affordance.

Field.Name: UnsubscribeEvent
Field.Description: Unsubscribe from an event affordance.

UADataType.Description: An immutable snapshot of a document's format and compatibility validation result. Read as a single Variant value; a new snapshot is produced on each validation and never mutated in place.

Field.Name: FormatValidated
Field.Description: True if format validation was performed.

Field.Name: FormatOutcome
Field.Description: Outcome of format validation (WoT-TD/WoT-TM conformance).

Field.Name: FormatReason
Field.Description: Human-readable reason for the format outcome (empty on success).

Field.Name: CompatibilityValidated
Field.Description: True if compatibility validation was performed.

Field.Name: CompatibilityOutcome
Field.Description: Outcome of compatibility validation against the resource policy.

Field.Name: CompatibilityReason
Field.Description: Human-readable reason for the compatibility outcome (empty on success).

Field.Name: CompatibilityPolicy
Field.Description: The compatibility policy in force (for example NONE, BACKWARD, FULL).

Field.Name: ValidatedAt
Field.Description: UTC time the validation completed.

Field.Name: VocabularyVersion
Field.Description: The pinned WoT Binding JSON-LD vocabulary version used for validation.

UADataType.Description: An immutable snapshot of a protocol binding's identity, version-pinned W3C document, maturity and supported operations. Held as an array element only for immutable snapshots; browseable binding objects (WoTBindingType) carry the live, per-field form.

Field.Name: BindingUri
Field.Description: The WoT protocol-binding vocabulary URI (for example the OPC UA, HTTP or Modbus binding).

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: Human-readable binding title.

Field.Name: ProfileVersion
Field.Description: The version-pinned W3C binding document version this capability snapshot was built against.

Field.Name: DraftMaturity
Field.Description: The W3C maturity of the pinned binding document (for example WD, CR, PR, REC).

Field.Name: Capabilities
Field.Description: The interaction operations this binding supports.

Field.Name: ContentTypes
Field.Description: The content types this binding produces/consumes.

UADataType.Description: Immutable options controlling a single Refresh invocation.

Field.Name: Atomicity
Field.Description: Commit granularity for this refresh.

Field.Name: Force
Field.Description: Re-project even when the content digest is unchanged.

Field.Name: DryRun
Field.Description: Validate and compute results without committing any projection change.

Field.Name: IncludeDependents
Field.Description: Also refresh documents that depend on the selected documents.

Field.Name: DeletePolicy
Field.Description: How to treat dependents when a selected document is unloaded/retired.

Field.Name: MaxParallelism
Field.Description: Maximum number of documents projected concurrently; 0 lets the server decide.

Field.Name: Timeout
Field.Description: Overall time budget for the refresh; 0 lets the server decide.

UADataType.Description: An immutable selector identifying which stored documents a Refresh applies to. An empty selector array selects the whole registry.

Field.Name: Kind
Field.Description: Restrict to Thing Descriptions or Thing Models; omit to select both.

Field.Name: GroupId
Field.Description: Restrict to a group by groupid; empty selects all groups.

Field.Name: ResourceId
Field.Description: Restrict to a resource by resourceid; empty selects all resources.

Field.Name: VersionId
Field.Description: Restrict to a version by versionid; empty selects the resource's default version.

Field.Name: Xid
Field.Description: Select a single entity by its xRegistry xid; overrides the other fields when set.

UADataType.Description: An immutable per-resource result row of a Refresh. Never mutated; the array is a point-in-time snapshot for one generation.

Field.Name: Xid
Field.Description: The xRegistry xid of the affected resource/version.

Field.Name: GroupId
Field.Description: The groupid of the resource's group.

Field.Name: ResourceId
Field.Description: The resourceid of the affected resource.

Field.Name: VersionId
Field.Description: The versionid that was projected.

Field.Name: Kind
Field.Description: Whether the document is a Thing Description or a Thing Model.

Field.Name: Outcome
Field.Description: The per-resource outcome.

Field.Name: Phase
Field.Description: The phase the resource reached (the failing phase on failure).

Field.Name: LoadState
Field.Description: The resulting load state of the projection.

Field.Name: Generation
Field.Description: The refresh generation this result belongs to.

Field.Name: MaterializedNodeCount
Field.Description: Number of AddressSpace nodes materialized for this resource.

Field.Name: RootNodeId
Field.Description: The root node of the materialized projection, if any.

Field.Name: ContentDigest
Field.Description: The content digest (hash) of the projected document bytes.

Field.Name: Message
Field.Description: Human-readable detail for the outcome.

UADataType.Description: An immutable summary of one Refresh invocation, also carried by the WoTRefreshCompletedEventType and cached on the registry as LastRefreshSummary.

Field.Name: RequestId
Field.Description: The caller-supplied request identifier echoed back for correlation.

Field.Name: Generation
Field.Description: The committed refresh generation (0 on a dry run or full failure).

Field.Name: Outcome
Field.Description: The overall outcome of the refresh.

Field.Name: Atomicity
Field.Description: The commit granularity that was applied.

Field.Name: StartTime
Field.Description: UTC start time of the refresh.

Field.Name: EndTime
Field.Description: UTC end time of the refresh.

Field.Name: Total
Field.Description: Total number of resources considered.

Field.Name: Succeeded
Field.Description: Number of resources that changed successfully.

Field.Name: Unchanged
Field.Description: Number of resources that were idempotently unchanged.

Field.Name: Failed
Field.Description: Number of resources that failed.

Field.Name: Skipped
Field.Description: Number of resources skipped by selection or policy.

Field.Name: Retired
Field.Description: Number of superseded generations retired.

UADataType.Description: An immutable edge of the document dependency DAG, used to describe closures in results and diagnostics.

Field.Name: SourceXid
Field.Description: The xid of the dependent document.

Field.Name: TargetXid
Field.Description: The xid of the document depended upon (empty if unresolved).

Field.Name: TargetUri
Field.Description: The raw href/URI of the dependency as authored in the document.

Field.Name: RefType
Field.Description: The dependency kind (for example tm:extends, tm:ref, links.rel=type).

Field.Name: Resolved
Field.Description: True if the dependency resolved to a stored document.

UAObjectType.Description: The WoT Connectivity V2 registry root - an xRegistry RegistryType (a FolderType) that holds ThingDescriptionGroupType and ThingModelGroupType groups. The stored Thing Description / Thing Model files and their versions are canonical; the projected AddressSpace (types from Thing Models, instances from Thing Descriptions) is derived code-behind. Exposed as a well-known WoTRegistry object under the Server object (i=2253). Adds registry-wide refresh, generation and validation-policy state and the Refresh Method.

An xRegistry GroupType that collects related ThingDescriptionFileType resources (a Thing Description Group per the WoT xRegistry model). Adds the group-level format/compatibility validation policy. Its <ThingDescription> placeholder constrains members to the Thing Description subtype.

An xRegistry GroupType that collects related ThingModelFileType resources (a Thing Model Group per the WoT xRegistry model). Adds the group-level format/compatibility validation policy. Its <ThingModel> placeholder constrains members to the Thing Model subtype.

The abstract base of a stored WoT document resource - an xRegistry ResourceType (a FileType) whose content bytes are the JSON-LD document, read/written with the inherited Open/Read/Write/Close Methods. Adds the derived-projection metadata (load state, desired/active version, validation and compatibility outcomes, content digest, materialized-node count and root, selected bindings) and the Validate, SetEnabled and SetDefaultVersion Methods. Concrete subtypes fix the document kind.

A concrete WoTDocumentType whose content is a W3C WoT Thing Description (WoT-TD/1.1, application/td+json). Projects to OPC UA instances: affordances become Variables, Methods and event sources; forms become binder plans. Adds the Thing instance identity (ThingId, base URI) and the link to the Thing Model it derives from.

A concrete WoTDocumentType whose content is a W3C WoT Thing Model (WoT-TM/1.1, application/tm+json). Projects to OPC UA types: it materializes an ObjectType or VariableType and the affordance member declarations and modelling rules. Adds the derived type NodeId and model version.

A browseable protocol-binding descriptor: the live, per-field representation of one W3C WoT protocol binding the server can realize (its URI, title, version-pinned W3C document, draft maturity, enabled state, content types and a capability snapshot). Selected/active binding sets are additionally exposed as immutable WoTBindingCapabilityDataType array snapshots. Policy and identity are browseable; no credentials or secrets are ever exposed here.

The common base event for a WoT resource lifecycle notification. Carries the identity of the affected resource/version, the document kind, the refresh generation, the phase reached and the outcome. Abstract; servers emit one of its concrete subtypes.
Raised when a document fails format or compatibility validation. The failing resource is the event source; the stored document is retained and any previous valid projection stays active.
Raised when a validated document fails to project (materialize) into the AddressSpace, or when its shadow generation cannot be activated. The failing resource is the event source.
Raised when a form cannot be bound to its protocol binding (unknown binding, unsupported operation or a runtime binder error). The failing resource is the event source.
Raised by the registry when a Refresh completes (including automatic refreshes). Carries the refresh summary and the committed generation. The registry object is the event source.

UAReferenceType.Description: Links a stored WoT document resource (source) to the root node of its derived AddressSpace projection (target). Used to correlate materialized nodes and their NodeVersion with the canonical document, and to find the document behind a projected node.

UAVariable.Description: True if the registry automatically re-projects stored documents (per RefreshMode); false if only explicit Refresh calls re-project.
How automatic refresh is triggered when AutoRefresh is true.
The interval used when RefreshMode is Periodic.
The current committed projection generation; incremented on every committed refresh. Materialized nodes carry the generation in their NodeVersion for correlation.
UTC time of the last completed refresh.
An immutable snapshot summarizing the last completed refresh.
The commit granularity applied when a Refresh omits an explicit atomicity.
The default policy for treating dependents on unload/delete.
Registry-wide default: validate document format on ingest/refresh.
Registry-wide default: validate version compatibility on ingest/refresh.
If true, a validation warning is treated as a failure.
The version-pinned WoT Binding JSON-LD vocabulary this registry validates and projects against.
An immutable snapshot array of the protocol bindings currently selected/active registry-wide.

UAObject.Description: A folder of browseable WoTBindingType binding descriptors the server can realize (the live, per-field form of the selected-bindings snapshot).
A Thing Description Group held by this registry (constrained to the ThingDescriptionGroupType subtype).
A Thing Model Group held by this registry (constrained to the ThingModelGroupType subtype).

UAMethod.Description: Re-project selected stored documents into the AddressSpace. Idempotent: a document whose content digest is unchanged is reported Unchanged and not re-materialized unless Options.Force is set. Projects into a shadow generation and switches atomically per Options.Atomicity; superseded generations are retired after their monitored items drain. If ExpectedGeneration is non-zero and does not equal RefreshGeneration, the call fails with Bad_InvalidState and changes nothing (optimistic concurrency). An empty Selection selects the whole registry.

Description.Text: The documents to refresh; empty selects the whole registry.
Options controlling atomicity, force, dry-run and dependents.
Expected current RefreshGeneration for optimistic concurrency; 0 disables the check.
Caller-supplied identifier echoed into the summary and the completion event.
The committed generation (unchanged on dry run or full failure).

UAVariable.Description: Group-level policy: validate Thing Description format (WoT-TD/1.1) on ingest.
Group-level policy: validate version compatibility on ingest.
Group-level policy: require all versions of a resource to share one format.

UAObject.Description: A Thing Description resource held by this group (constrained to the ThingDescriptionFileType subtype).

UAVariable.Description: Group-level policy: validate Thing Model format (WoT-TM/1.1) on ingest.
Group-level policy: validate version compatibility on ingest.
Group-level policy: require all versions of a resource to share one format.

UAObject.Description: A Thing Model resource held by this group (constrained to the ThingModelFileType subtype).

UAVariable.Description: Whether this document is a Thing Description or a Thing Model. Fixed by the concrete subtype.
The desired enabled state: true requests that the document be validated and projected; false requests unload.
The actual lifecycle state of this document's derived projection.
The versionid the operator wants active for this resource (the desired/pinned version).
The versionid whose projection is currently active.
xRegistry isdefault: true when this version is the resource's default (sticky) version.
xRegistry ancestor: the versionid this version derives from (version lineage).
The compatibility policy all versions of this resource adhere to (for example NONE, BACKWARD, FULL).
Per-document override of the registry AutoRefresh setting.
The registry generation at which this document was last projected.
UTC time this document was last projected.
The content digest (hash) of the stored document bytes; used to make refresh idempotent.
An immutable snapshot of this document's format and compatibility validation result.
The number of AddressSpace nodes materialized from this document's active projection.
The root node of this document's active projection (the type or instance root).
An immutable snapshot array of the protocol bindings selected for this document's forms.

UAMethod.Description: Validate the stored document (format and, when enabled, compatibility) without changing its projection. Returns the outcome snapshot; also refreshes the ValidationOutcome Property.

Set the desired Enabled state of this document. Enabling requests validation and projection; disabling requests unload per the registry DeletePolicy. If ExpectedEpoch is non-zero and does not equal the resource's current Epoch the call fails with Bad_InvalidState and changes nothing.

Description.Text: Expected current Epoch for optimistic concurrency; 0 disables the check.

UAMethod.Description: Make a specific version of this resource its default (sticky) version, so that resolvers selecting the resource without a versionid resolve to it. If ExpectedEpoch is non-zero and does not equal the resource's current Epoch the call fails with Bad_InvalidState and changes nothing.

Description.Text: Expected current Epoch for optimistic concurrency; 0 disables the check.

UAVariable.Description: The Thing Description id (a URI/URN identifying the concrete Thing instance).
The Thing Description human-readable title.
The Thing Description base URI used to resolve relative form hrefs.
The xid or href of the Thing Model this Thing Description derives from (links rel=type), when present.
The Thing Model human-readable title.
The Thing Model version (WoT version.model), when present.
The ObjectType or VariableType materialized from this Thing Model.
The WoT protocol-binding vocabulary URI this descriptor represents.
Human-readable binding title.
The version-pinned W3C binding document version.
The W3C maturity of the pinned binding document (for example WD, CR, PR, REC).
True if the server currently realizes forms of this binding.
The content types this binding produces/consumes.
An immutable capability snapshot for this binding.
The xRegistry xid of the affected resource/version.
The resourceid of the affected resource.
The versionid of the affected version.
Whether the document is a Thing Description or a Thing Model.
The refresh generation the notification relates to.
The phase reached (the failing phase on a failure event).
The outcome the notification reports.
The full validation outcome snapshot for the failure.
The load state after the failed projection/activation.
The node whose materialization failed, if identifiable.
Human-readable failure reason.
The binding URI that could not be bound.
Human-readable binding failure reason.
The refresh summary snapshot.
The caller-supplied request identifier echoed from the Refresh call.
The committed generation.

UAObject.Description: The server-wide WoT Connectivity V2 registry, a well-known component of the Server object. Its stored Thing Description / Thing Model files are canonical; the projected AddressSpace is derived. It is the notifier for the WoT resource lifecycle events raised by its groups and resources.

UAMethod.Description: Re-project selected stored documents into the AddressSpace. The functional Refresh Method on the well-known WoTRegistry object; a server binds the concrete handler.

Description.Text: The documents to refresh; empty selects the whole registry.
Options controlling atomicity, force, dry-run and dependents.
Expected current RefreshGeneration for optimistic concurrency; 0 disables the check.
Caller-supplied identifier echoed into the summary and the completion event.
The committed generation (unchanged on dry run or full failure).

UAVariable.Description: xRegistry registryid: the stable identifier of this registry (Mandatory, inherited from the xRegistry RegistryType). Default value for the well-known instance; a server MAY override it.
The current committed projection generation; incremented on every committed refresh (Mandatory). Materialized as 0 at load time, before any Refresh has committed.
